core_mechanism: Discriminating a genuine physical effect from an artifact of the chosen description by re-expressing an apparent secular (order-by-order accumulating) drift as an operator invariant under the theory's redundancy/gauge transformations, keeping the drift only if it survives in the invariant observable
brief_reason: The abstract shows the tadpole correction used to indicate a decaying effective Lambda is not gauge invariant, then constructs a gauge-invariant operator (the renormalized curvature scalar smeared over a window function) that exhibits no secular change, revealing the apparent effect as a gauge artifact.
